item.title: Invivyd / Measles Antibody Drug
item.description:
• Summary: Invivyd is advancing the development of a monoclonal antibody drug for measles, aimed at providing passive immunization or treatment, particularly in scenarios where vaccination is inadequate or for high-risk populations.
  • MoAs: The antibody drug neutralizes the measles virus by binding to viral hemagglutinin or fusion proteins, blocking viral entry and spread in host cells.
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive
